title: D4vd preliminary hearing: Celeste Rivas' family lawyer describes 'gruesome' crime scene photos
summary_full: Singer D4vd's preliminary hearing revealed disturbing crime scene photos. Celeste Rivas' family lawyer described the evidence as gruesome and painful. Prosecutors allege D4vd lured Rivas to his home and dismembered her body. D4vd has pleaded not guilty to all charges against him. The case continues as the judge determines if it will proceed to trial.
